title: gaultheria pullei
intro: Gaultheria pullei, also known as the Mount Pulley Gaultheria, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from the essential oil extracted from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Gaultheria pullei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Gaultheria pullei can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, teas, and oils, which are often used in traditional medicine.
